query: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name, u.email, u.createdAt AS userCreatedAt, u.updatedAt AS userUpdatedAt, u.lastSignedIn, p.id AS participantId, p.displayName, p.createdAt AS participantCreatedAt, p.updatedAt AS participantUpdatedAt FROM users u LEFT JOIN participants p ON p.userId = u.id WHERE u.id = 151404 OR p.id = 60011;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name, u.email, u.createdAt AS userCreatedAt, u.updatedAt AS userUpdatedAt, u.lastSignedIn, p.id AS participantId, p.displayName, p.createdAt AS participantCreatedAt, p.updatedAt AS participantUpdatedAt FROM users u LEFT JOIN participants p ON p.userId = u.id WHERE u.id = 151404 OR p.id = 60011;
